_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: SparkButton
_meta.description: Ruixen Nova is a modern, glowing UI button component designed for sleek and high-performance web interfaces. With animated radial and conic gradients, this button brings a soft, dynamic glow effect that draws user attention without being distracting. Built using React and Tailwind CSS, it supports full customization including color, speed, and element type (as prop), making it highly flexible for any design system. Perfect for call-to-actions, modals, or hero sections, Ruixen Nova blends beauty with functionality and elevates your interface with a premium, futuristic feel.
